'''gazhodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xinomavro|xinomavro]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-zh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xinomavro|xinomavro]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gazhodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæzhedheth|gæzhedheth]] || [[word:gæzhedhej|gæzhedhej]] || [[word:gæzhedhesh|gæzhedhesh]] || [[word:gæzhedhe|gæzhedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gazhozhodhoth|gazhozhodhoth]] || [[word:gazhozhodhoj|gazhozhodhoj]] || [[word:gazhozhodhosh|gazhozhodhosh]] || [[word:gazhozhodho|gazhozhodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gazhodhoth|gazhodhoth]] || [[word:gazhodhoj|gazhodhoj]] || [[word:gazhodhosh|gazhodhosh]] || [[word:gazhodho|gazhodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gazhofdhoth|gazhofdhoth]] || [[word:gazhofdhoj|gazhofdhoj]] || [[word:gazhofdhosh|gazhofdhosh]] || [[word:gazhofdhof|gazhofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gazhodhotho|gazhodhotho]] || [[word:gazhodhojo|gazhodhojo]] || [[word:gazhodhosho|gazhodhosho]] || [[word:gazhodhoko|gazhodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gazhodhoth|gazhodhoth]] || [[word:gazhodhoj|gazhodhoj]] || [[word:gazhodhosh|gazhodhosh]] || [[word:gazhodho|gazhodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gazhodhothol|gazhodhothol]] || [[word:gazhodhojol|gazhodhojol]] || [[word:gazhodhoshol|gazhodhoshol]] || [[word:gazhodhokol|gazhodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gazhodhothotho|gazhodhothotho]] || [[word:gazhodhojojo|gazhodhojojo]] || [[word:gazhodhoshosho|gazhodhoshosho]] || [[word:gazhodhoko|gazhodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gazhodhothon|gazhodhothon]] || [[word:gazhodhojon|gazhodhojon]] || [[word:gazhodhoshon|gazhodhoshon]] || [[word:gazhodhokon|gazhodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gazhodhothoro|gazhodhothoro]] || [[word:gazhodhojoro|gazhodhojoro]] || [[word:gazhodhoshoro|gazhodhoshoro]] || [[word:gazhodhokoro|gazhodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
